system_overview.name: Autonomous Office Calculator
system_overview.description: A calculator system with desired input methods, calculator functions, storage, and user interface design.

name: Calculator Engine
Input Method Interface
UI Component
Storage Manager
description: Responsible for performing calculations and storing results.
Provides a user-friendly input method for users to interact with the calculator.
Handles user interface design and display of calculator results.
Manages data storage and retrieval for the calculator.

data_models.name: Calculator Input
data_models.description: Represents user input to the calculator

data_models.name: Calculator Result
data_models.description: Represents the result of a calculation

api_endpoints.description: Perform a calculation with user input
Retrieve a list of previous calculations

assumptions.input: The calculator engine will utilize pre-built libraries for numerical computations to ensure accuracy.
The input method interface will provide a secure and user-friendly way for users to interact with the calculator.
The UI component will handle the display of calculator results and provide a visually appealing interface for users.
The storage manager will maintain data consistency across multiple operations and provide efficient data retrieval.

Regularly update dependencies and perform security audits.
